claimBoundary: This is explicitly post-hoc exploratory decomposition of an already accepted numerical artifact. Lag searches and component metrics were not preregistered and cannot promote experimental agreement, grid convergence, production physics, or free flight.
nextAction: Preregister a single RR3 D32 source-viscosity pre-roll. Advance to a D32 full window only if positivity, both momentum ledgers, tau margin, working set, and correction intrusion pass unchanged; use D28/D32 only for same-physics force refinement, not as a promise that refinement will resolve the measured-force mismatch.
scientificInterpretation: The D28 source-viscosity result retains a recognizable vertical-force shape but overpredicts its mean, while horizontal force has weak shape agreement and a large mean deficit. The modest change from the older D16 over-viscous result does not isolate grid from viscosity effects and does not support experimental agreement.
